name: Daiquiri
description: A classic shaken Daiquiri made with white rum, fresh lime juice, and sugar for a crisp, refreshing drink. Discover how to make the perfect Daiquiri cocktail at home. The original BACARDÍ Daiquiri recipe combines BACARDÍ Carta Blanca rum with fresh lime juice and sugar for a crisp, refreshing drink.
recipe_steps: Add the fresh lime juice and sugar to your cocktail shaker, then stir until the sugar completely dissolves.
Pour in BACARDÍ Carta Blanca rum, then fill the shaker with half cubed ice and half crushed ice.
Shake vigorously until the shaker becomes frosted and ice-cold to the touch.
Strain through a fine strainer into a chilled cocktail glass for the perfect Daiquiri.
searchable_text: Daiquiri main rum BACARDÍ Carta Blanca A classic shaken Daiquiri made with white rum, fresh lime juice, and sugar for a crisp, refreshing drink. Discover how to make the perfect Daiquiri cocktail at home. The original BACARDÍ Daiquiri recipe combines BACARDÍ Carta Blanca rum with fresh lime juice and sugar for a crisp, refreshing drink. ingredients 50 ml BACARDÍ Carta Blanca, 25 ml fresh lime juice, 2 tsp caster sugar, cubed & crushed ice recipe steps Add the fresh lime juice and sugar to your cocktail shaker, then stir until the sugar completely dissolves. Pour in BACARDÍ Carta Blanca rum, then fill the shaker with half cubed ice and half crushed ice. Shake vigorously until the shaker becomes frosted and ice-cold to the touch. Strain through a fine strainer into a chilled cocktail glass for the perfect Daiquiri.
